headyme.com.name: HeadyMe

features.title: Personal Dashboard

features.title: Cloud Storage

features.title: Cross-Vertical Sync

headysystems.com.name: HeadySystems
headysystems.com.description: Enterprise-grade AI infrastructure powering 9 domains, 50+ patents, and 20 autonomous AI nodes. Self-healing, Sacred Geometry orchestration, and continuous deployment — built by Heady Systems LLC since 2024.

features.title: Self-Healing Infrastructure
features.desc: Auto-heal resilience loops, circuit breakers, and autonomous error recovery across all services

features.title: Buddy Orchestrator
features.desc: Multi-agent orchestration via Sacred Geometry — 150+ supervisors coordinating 20 AI nodes

features.title: Live Telemetry & Observability
features.desc: Structured logging, health probes, race audits, and real-time performance dashboards

features.title: HCFP Auto-Success Pipeline
features.desc: Continuous deployment with security scanning, SBOM generation, smoke tests, and auto-verification

features.title: Zero Trust Security
features.desc: mTLS client certs, secret rotation, Cloudflare WARP enforcement, and TruffleHog scanning

features.title: Edge Mesh Network
features.desc: Cloudflare Workers edge proxy with KV caching, sub-50ms latency, and deterministic routing
